user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view candidates ready for offer release in a list with all candidate details, so that I can release offers to approved candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Release Offer screen; When the list loads; Then candidates in the offer-release stage are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can locate a specific candidate to release an offer to
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Release Offer screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the release offer list, so that I see the latest candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Release Offer screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate hiring stage filters such as Offered and Accepted, so that I can move between pipeline stages from the Release Offer view
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Release Offer screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
